[[BLOCK:slide47_shape1]]
•   The chart illustrates the explored path.  
•   The horizontal axis represents the shrinkage parameter.  
•   As the algorithm iterates through various alternative models, the AICc (Akaike’s Information Criterion corrected) gradually decreases.  
When the AICc curve flattens, it indicates no further improvement is possible (AICc cannot decrease further), and the final solution is adopted.
